_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: GTNH 2.8.X + Twist Space Technology
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH 2.8.x egg for Java 17-25 with Twist Space Technology enabled.
Main server port follows the panel allocation port.
Query and RCON remain configurable via variables.
Reinstall updates GTNH and re-downloads TST.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${TST_VERSION:=latest}"
: "${TST_UPDATE:=0}"

GTNH_ZIP_FILE="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
BACKUP_DIR="$BASE_DIR/installtemp"

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

# Backup JourneyMapServer if it exists
if [ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer to $BACKUP_DIR..."
  mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
  rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer"
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

echo "Deleting old GTNH files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl unzip
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

cd "$BASE_DIR"
echo "Downloading and extracting $GTNH_ZIP_FILE..."
curl -fL -o "$GTNH_ZIP_FILE" "https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks/$GTNH_ZIP_FILE"
unzip -n "$GTNH_ZIP_FILE"
rm -f "$GTNH_ZIP_FILE" *.md *.bat

if [ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

# Restore backed-up JourneyMapServer config if present
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer from installtemp..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found — skipping restore."
fi

echo "Twist Space Technology support is always enabled in this egg."

if [ "$GTVERSION" != "2.8.4" ]; then
  echo "WARNING: TST upstream README currently lists GTNH 2.8.4 as the maintained/supported branch."
  echo "WARNING: You selected GTVERSION=$GTVERSION. Continuing anyway."
fi

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/mods"

if [ -z "$TST_VERSION" ] || [ "$TST_VERSION" = "latest" ]; then
  echo "Resolving latest TST release tag..."
  TST_VERSION="$(curl -fsSLI -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' https://github.com/Nxer/Twist-Space-Technology-Mod/releases/latest | sed 's#.*/##')"
  if [ -z "$TST_VERSION" ]; then
    echo "Failed to resolve latest TST release tag."
    exit 1
  fi
fi

TST_JAR="TwistSpaceTechnology-${TST_VERSION}.jar"
TST_URL="https://github.com/Nxer/Twist-Space-Technology-Mod/releases/download/${TST_VERSION}/${TST_JAR}"

echo "Removing old TST jars..."
find "$BASE_DIR/mods" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name 'TwistSpaceTechnology-*.jar' -o -name 'TwistSpaceTechnology *.jar' \) -delete

echo "Downloading ${TST_JAR}..."
curl -fL -o "$BASE_DIR/mods/$TST_JAR" "$TST_URL"

if [ "$TST_UPDATE" = "1" ]; then
  echo "TST update mode enabled -> resetting GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg as recommended by the TST README..."
  rm -f "$BASE_DIR/GregTech.lang" "$BASE_DIR/config/GregTech.lang"
  rm -f "$BASE_DIR/config/TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg"
else
  echo "TST update mode disabled -> keeping existing GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg"
fi

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. TST upstream currently maintains/supports GTNH 2.8.4 with TST 0.7.+

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Twist Space Technology version
variables.description: Use a specific TST release tag such as 0.7.15, or 'latest' to resolve the newest release automatically.

variables.name: Update Twist Space Technology
variables.description: Set to 1 ONLY when updating TST. This resets GregTech.lang and TwistSpaceTechnology.cfg as required by the TST README. Set back to 0 after reinstall.
